The '''Crusaders''' were a group of [[droid]]s within the [[Second Revelation]],<ref name="Dark Droids 1" /> a group of [[Sentience|sentient]] droids,<ref name="Dark Droids 2">{{SW|url=news/marvel-star-wars-september-2023-preview|text=Uncover the ''Dark Droids'' Crossover Event in Marvel's September 2023 ''Star Wars'' Comics – Exclusive Preview}}</ref> that were sent out to find more droids like them.<ref name="Dark Droids 1" /> Between [[3 ABY]] and [[4 ABY]],<ref name="Date">The events of [[Dark Droids 1|''Dark Droids'' 1]] take place after the [[Escape from Cloud City]] and before the [[Rescue of Han Solo]], which are dated to [[3 ABY]] and [[4 ABY]], respectively, by ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Atlas]]''.</ref> one Crusader known as [[Petyr]] was stationed aboard an [[Scourge 01|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] until he was [[Death|destroyed]] by [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] droids corrupted by the [[Scourge]].<ref name="Dark Droids 1" />

{{Company-stub}}
